# Parent #500 — Enforce Meta public-release evidence gate (constant)\
## Product boundary\
- Meta/harness enforcement only (ADR-035 + core-orchestration)\
- Classify publicRelease; require schema-valid releaseEvidencePlan before Executor\
- Fail closed; sub-agents must not infer or waive the plan\
## Slices\
- META-1 (#513) classification + releaseEvidencePlan Meta gates\
- META-2 (#514) injection contract + tddContract\
- META-3 (#515) CI validators (TDD evidence, domain, phaseRunId, continuity)\
- META-4 (#516) E2E fixtures + CHECKS wiring + docs\
## Epic deferrals\
- ECS candidate verification (#498)\
- Demo asset repair (#499)\
- User-traffic canaries / RUM / EKS\
